evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Adopting Global Business Intelligence standards including version control, testing, documentation, and data governance
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour signals dominate — testing, documentation, data governance, data validation, attention to data quality — with no velocity/speed language present.
evidence.domain_risk: Crisis management or maritime domain experience
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Document intelligence platform for operational/crisis decision support without explicit financial-reporting or regulatory-compliance language, so moderate.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Designing end-to-end pipelines: ingestion -> extraction -> structuring -> delivery
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The role builds the entire pipeline and platform from ingestion through delivery for a new document-intelligence capability, indicating the function is being established rather than an existing mature practice.
evidence.jd_authorship: Hands-on LLM/AI APIs: prompt design, structured extraction, information retrieval
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Named, specific technical practices (OCR, RAG, multi-format content handling, prompt design) make the day-to-day work very clear.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Building semantic layers and search indices enabling users to find and extract insights
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role centers on the data/search platform itself serving internal data consumers via self-service search and dashboards, placing it in internal_data.
evidence.autonomy_level: Independent work style with high autonomy and attention to data quality
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role designs end-to-end pipelines and platform architecture independently with explicit high-autonomy framing, a clearly strategic/direction-setting role.
evidence.ai_role: Hands-on LLM/AI APIs: prompt design, structured extraction, information retrieval
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate both builds AI-consuming data infrastructure (semantic layers, RAG, agents) and uses LLM/AI APIs directly as core tooling; per the tie-breaker, both signals present resolves to ai_enabler.
evidence.testing_framing: Adopting Global Business Intelligence standards including version control, testing, documentation, and data governance
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing and governance are framed as an owned standard the candidate adopts and applies, not just a listed tool.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: SQL expertise: query optimization, incremental processing, data validation
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: data validation and quality attention are recurring but framed as pipeline reliability rather than compliance or regulatory risk.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Designing end-to-end pipelines: ingestion -> extraction -> structuring -> delivery
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role explicitly designs new end-to-end infrastructure for a document-intelligence platform from scratch, a clear greenfield signal.
